events.text: Goal!  Nigeria 0, Argentina 1. Lionel Messi (Argentina) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Éver Banega with a through ball.
Leon Balogun (Nigeria) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Javier Mascherano (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Nigeria 1, Argentina 1. Victor Moses (Nigeria) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the centre of the goal.
Éver Banega (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Nigeria 1, Argentina 2. Marcos Rojo (Argentina) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Gabriel Mercado with a cross.
John Obi Mikel (Nigeria) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Lionel Messi (Argentina) is shown the yellow card.
